description: Pinned real PR-shaped diffs across languages for the review-surfaces effectiveness benchmark (BENCH.1). Each case pins a public repo + base/head commit SHAs; `node bench/run.mjs` clones the two commits on demand and runs the full `all` pipeline (mock provider, hermetic). `expected_focus` is OPTIONAL (adds the top-5 recall metric); the other metrics need no annotation. The seed leans on EXCLUSION-STRESS cases — source mixed with docs / lockfiles (go.sum, Cargo.lock, uv.lock) / CI workflows / config — so the floor's exclusion is exercised on real diffs. Add cases freely; target 20-30.
